heading: Duplicate orders to print
label: 705 Duplicate orders to print
text: The Director of the Government Publishing Office shall examine the orders of the Senate and House of Representatives for printing, and in case of duplication shall print under the first order received.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesBased on 44 U.S. Code, 1964 ed., § 135 (, ).Jan. 12, 1895, ch. 23, § 5328 Stat. 608
Amendments2014— substituted “Director of the Government Publishing Office” for “Public Printer”.Pub. L. 113–235
